title: Measure a Resistor
description: Use a digital multimeter to confirm a loose resistor's value. Disconnect all power, keep metal jewelry off, set components on a dry non-conductive surface, and wear safety goggles.

dialogue.text:
Place the loose resistor, digital multimeter, and safety goggles on a dry, non-conductive surface.
Put on the goggles. Insert the black probe into COM and the red probe into VΩmA, then set the meter to resistance (Ω) mode at a range above the resistor's expected value.

Hold the resistor by its body so fingers stay off the leads. Grip the probes by their insulated handles, touching the black probe to one lead and the red to the other without the probes or your fingers touching.
Wait for the reading to stabilize near the color-band value; stop if the resistor warms, the reading spikes, or the probes slip.

options.text: It reads about what the color bands predicted.

dialogue.text: Label the resistor's value, turn off the meter, unplug the probes, and store everything.
